arts.ttl: Karim Adeyemi thanks Kovac for ‘trust’ to aid development
arts.sum: Karim Adeyemi almost left Borussia Dortmund for Napoli in January, but the German attacker is integral to Niko Kovač’s plans which has seen the 23-year-old start in each game since…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund signing a doubt for Lille clash
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund’s winter signing Carney Chukwuemeka is a doubt for their UEFA Champions League game against Lille on Tuesday night, Niko Kovač confirmed in Monday’s press conference. The Englishman had…

arts.ttl: Gio Reyna: USMNT star had January transfer RUINED by American owner
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund attacker Gio Reyna was on the verge of a January transfer to RB Leipzig, but the move collapsed due to American Lyon owner John Textor, according to German media. Gio Reyna: USMNT star had January transfer RUINED by American owner

arts.ttl: BVB cool interest in Stuttgart's Millot, according to L'Equipe
arts.sum: Enzo Millot has caught the eye on more than a few occasions, but Dortmund's interest seems to have cooled in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Champions League Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs Lille
arts.sum: Coming off the back of two Bundesliga wins, Borussia Dortmund will aim to keep that winning feeling when they host Ligue 1’s Lille in the last 16 of the Champions…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund intrested in Enzo Millot, but…
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have an interest in VfB Stuttgart’s Enzo Millot (22), according to a report from L’Équipe, however, there is no guarantee that they will make a move for the France youth…

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: Adeyemi Steers Borussia Dortmund to Victory Against St. Pauli
arts.sum: Not long after, Adeyemi turned finisher, chasing down a Maximilian Beier clearance, outmuscling Philipp Treu, and running the length of St. Pauli’s half with the ball to score Dortmund’s second and put the game out of sight for St. Pauli. Borussia Dortmund claimed all three points on the road, beating St. Pauli 2-0 at the Millerntor in a steady, workmanlike performance that looked much like what we should expect from Niko Kovač’s BVB moving forward.

arts.ttl: Marquinhos makes PSG history in victory over Lille
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain continued their dominance in Ligue 1 on Saturday, on the same day their veteran captain achieved a historic first for the club. Marquinhos (30) netted his first goal…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund's Serhou Guirassy out to show Lille what they're missing
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy has been scoring for fun of late, but there was a time when the late-blooming Borussia Dortmund striker was deemed surplus to requirements by upcoming UEFA Champions League opponents Lille. After 28 goals for VfB Stuttgart in last season's Bundesliga, the Guinea international has 23 goals in 31 appearances in all competitions for the Black-Yellows so far, including a competition-leading 10 in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs. Lille: UEFA Champions League probable line-ups, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: UEFA Champions League top scorer Serhou Guirassy is looking to bring down former employers Lille when Borussia Dortmund welcome the French side to the Signal Iduna Park for Tuesday's last-16 first leg (kick-off: 9pm CET). After finishing 10th in the Champions League opening phase, BVB comfortably saw off the challenge of Sporting CP in a play-off, thanks in large part to the competition's top scorer with 10 goals and former Lille forward Guirassy.
